findings.description: Table first-column values `output`, `resources`, `log` are absent from hints. These directory names are useful for retrieval when users ask where output files or configuration files are stored.
findings.source_evidence: Source table lists: output（自動生成されるワークフロー定義データの出力ディレクトリ）、resources（本ツールの設定ファイル格納ディレクトリ）、log（エラー情報出力ファイルの出力ディレクトリ）

findings.description: `WorkflowDefinitionGenerator.xml` (the component definition file name) is missing from hints, even though it is a first-column value in the configuration file table and is a key file name for retrieval.
findings.source_evidence: Source configuration file table lists WorkflowDefinitionGenerator.xml as コンポーネント定義ファイル alongside WorkflowDefinitionGenerator.config (which is correctly included in hints).
